docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $265.97 FILED BY WILSON, RAY C/O RAY YOUNG AS TO DEFENDANT THE SALVATION ARMY RESIDENCES, INC. LANTZ, W. GENE: ADMINISTRATOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
